sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116366" key="w(ro/logos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὡρόλογ-ος</orth> (parox.), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n116366.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">an Egyptian astrologer,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chaerem.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:4:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
